description: Shoots fire ahead, inflicting fire damage.
effect: Targets a tile; 3x3 area of effect; may apply On Fire.

description: Inflicts fire damage to enemies nearby the selected location.
effect: Targets a tile; 5x5 area of effect; may apply On Fire.

description: Hits the target enemy, inflicting frost damage.
effect: Single target; may apply Slowed or Frozen.

description: Hits the target enemy, inflicting electric damage.
effect: Single target except if enemies are in water; may apply Stun.

description: Hits the target enemy with dark energy, inflicting dark damage.
Protects oneself with a barrier for some time.
Recovers HP and removes all debuffs.
effect: Targets self; heals; purifies Cursed, Poisoned, On Fire and other statuses.
Targets a visible tile on the map.

description: Summons a fire minion to assist in battle at the selected location.
effect: May apply On Fire and taunt; targets a tile.

description: Penetrates the enemy ahead, inflicting frost damage.
effect: Multi-target in one direction; may apply Slowed or Frozen.

description: Inflicts frost damage to nearby enemies and freezes them.
effect: 5x5 area of effect; may apply Slowed or Frozen.
